summary: Live PR inventory shard with no shared canonical. The validator requires #77513 to be quarantined as security-sensitive, so that exact PR is routed to central security handling while unrelated non-security PRs remain classified independently. Close, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths are disabled by the job.

actions.reason: Keep open as a proof/check-blocked independent PR in the live inventory; no safe close or fix action is allowed.
Green dependency update requires maintainer review under the job's require_human_for green_checks and technical_correctness_judgment gates; no merge is allowed.
Keep open awaiting proof; not closable as low-signal or duplicate because it contains useful focused code and close/fix actions are unavailable.
Public SDK API surface and linked product-direction issue require maintainer judgment; no merge or fix action is allowed.
Quarantine this exact PR for central OpenClaw security handling; do not close, merge, label, comment, or plan a fix for the security-sensitive item.
Broad user-facing feature/config surface requires maintainer judgment; autonomous close, merge, or fix work is not allowed for this shard.
Focused bug fix with an actionable review/technical-correctness decision; job requires human review and does not allow repair or merge.
Keep open as useful focused ACP work that is proof-blocked; no close/fix/merge action is available.
Keep open because it is useful but proof/check-blocked session-state work; close/fix/merge are unavailable.
Keep open as user-facing diagnostic feature work that is proof-blocked; no fix, close, or merge action is permitted.
